  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.config.SpecialRewardsConfig.getVotePartyIncreaseVotesRequiredWithTypo()
    Use getVotePartyIncreaseVotesRequired instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.addDayVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.addMonthVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.addWeekVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.checkDayVoteStreak(boolean)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getAllTimeTotal()
    Use getTotal(TopVoter.AllTime) when able instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getBestDayVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getBestMonthVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getBestWeekVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getDailyTotal()
    Use getTotal(TopVoter.Daily) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getDayVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getDayVoteStreakLastUpdate()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getMonthTotal()
    Use getTotal(TopVoter.Monthly) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getMonthVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getWeeklyTotal()
    Use getTotal(TopVoter.Weekly) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.getWeekVoteStreak()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setAllTimeTotal(int)
    Use setTotal(TopVoter.AllTime, allTimeTotal) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setBestDayVoteStreak(int)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setBestMonthVoteStreak(int)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setBestWeekVoteStreak(int)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setDailyTotal(int)
    Use setTotal(TopVoter.Daily, total) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setDayVoteStreak(int)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setDayVoteStreakLastUpdate(long)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setMonthTotal(int)
    Use setTotal(TopVoter.Monthly, total) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setMonthVoteStreak(int)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setWeeklyTotal(int)
    Use setTotal(TopVoter.Weekly, total) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.setWeekVoteStreak(int)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.voteCommandLastDate(VoteSite)
    Use getTime(VoteSite) instead
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser.voteStreakUpdatedToday(LocalDateTime)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.getUser(UUID)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.getVoteSite(String, boolean)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.getVoteSiteName(boolean, String...)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.getVoteSites()
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.getVoteSitesEnabled()

    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.hasVoteSite(String)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.VotingPluginMain.isVoteSite(String)

    Constructor
    Description
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.VoteTotalsSnapshot(int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, UUID)
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, String)
    Use VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, AdvancedCoreUser) instead.
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, UUID)
    Use VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, AdvancedCoreUser) instead.
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, UUID, boolean)
    Use VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, AdvancedCoreUser) instead.
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, UUID, String)
    Use VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, AdvancedCoreUser) instead.
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.user.VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, Player)
    Use VotingPluginUser(VotingPluginMain, AdvancedCoreUser) instead.

    Enum Constant
    Description
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.events.SpecialRewardType.ALLSITE
    All site reward.
    com.bencodez.votingplugin.events.SpecialRewardType.ALMOSTALLSITES
    Almost all sites reward.
